title: aira cespitosa var. parviflora
intro: Aira cespitosa var. parviflora, also known as small spike oat grass or small-flowered hair grass, is a type of flowering plant in the grass family Poaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its expectorant and antiseptic properties, which help in relieving respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. The health benefits of Aira cespitosa var. parviflora include reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and acting as a natural diuretic. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions due to its medicinal properties.
